_README: Golden-set labels for matcher recall eval. Each entry is a custom JD plus the candidates a recruiter considers genuine top matches. tier 'must' = should clearly be surfaced/scored near the top; tier 'should' = strong match whose JOB TITLE is off (so it leans on skill + semantic résumé match, not the title boost) — these are the cases that expose lexical-only gaps. DRAFT LABELS by the assistant — Ben to review/correct the pk lists and tiers. Run with scripts/eval_golden.py.

jds.title: Data Analyst (Excel / BI)
jds.description_summary: Data analyst focused on Excel-based analysis, translating datasets into trends and actionable business insights, and building reporting/dashboards for stakeholders.
responsibilities: Interpret datasets and identify trends to support business decisions
Perform data cleaning and analysis using advanced Excel functions
Build reports and dashboards to communicate insights to stakeholders
Query and validate data across sources
jds.jd_text: We are seeking a Data Analyst to interpret datasets, identify trends, and translate raw data into actionable business insights. The role centers on advanced Microsoft Excel analysis, building dashboards and reports (Power BI/Tableau), and querying data with SQL. You will clean and validate data, surface trends, and communicate findings clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders.

jds.title: BI / Dashboard Developer (deliberate lexical-stress: JD wording differs from candidates' canonical skills)
jds.description_summary: Build interactive dashboards and self-service reporting; turn business questions into visual analytics. Emphasis on dashboard development and data storytelling for decision-makers.
responsibilities: Design and ship interactive dashboards for business stakeholders
Turn ambiguous business questions into visual analytics
Automate recurring reports and data refreshes
Tell clear stories with data to drive decisions
jds.jd_text: Seeking a Business Intelligence Developer to design and ship interactive dashboards and self-service reporting. You will translate business questions into visual analytics, automate recurring reports, and present data-driven stories to decision-makers. Experience delivering dashboards (Power BI, Tableau) and modeling data for reporting is essential. NOTE: this JD deliberately uses skill wording ('Business Intelligence', 'Dashboard Development') that differs from the pool's canonical skill tags (e.g. 'Power BI', 'Tableau', 'Data Visualization') to test whether semantic retrieval recovers candidates the lexical term-match misses.

jds.title: Cybersecurity / SOC Analyst
jds.description_summary: Detect, investigate, and respond to security incidents. Monitor for threats, run vulnerability assessments, and harden networks. Hands-on incident response and threat analysis.
responsibilities: Monitor, detect, and investigate security incidents
Lead incident response and containment
Run vulnerability assessments and remediation
Analyze threats and harden network defenses
jds.jd_text: We need a Cybersecurity Analyst to monitor, detect, and respond to security incidents in a mission environment. Responsibilities include incident response and containment, vulnerability assessment and remediation, network security hardening, penetration testing support, and threat intelligence analysis. Strong hands-on defensive security skills required.

jds.title: Software Engineer (Python / AWS)
jds.description_summary: Build and deploy backend software services in Python/Java on AWS. Design APIs, write SQL-backed data layers, and ship cloud-native applications.
responsibilities: Design and build backend services in Python/Java
Deploy cloud-native applications on AWS
Implement SQL-backed data layers and APIs
Write tested, maintainable production code
jds.jd_text: Seeking a Software Engineer to design and build backend services in Python and Java, deploy cloud-native applications on AWS, and implement SQL-backed data layers and APIs. You will write tested, maintainable production code and collaborate on system design. Strong software development fundamentals and cloud experience required.

jds.title: Machine Learning Scientist
jds.description_summary: Design, train, and evaluate machine learning models. Apply data science and AI techniques in Python to production problems; communicate model results to stakeholders.
responsibilities: Design, train, and evaluate machine learning models
Apply data science and statistical methods to real problems
Prototype AI solutions in Python
Communicate model results and tradeoffs to stakeholders
jds.jd_text: We are hiring a Machine Learning Scientist to design, train, and evaluate ML models and apply data science and AI techniques in Python. You will prototype solutions, run statistical analysis, evaluate model performance, and communicate results and tradeoffs to stakeholders. Strong ML, statistics, and Python skills required.
